subject: Professor Magnolia, an elderly woman in a white lab coat, standing in front of a research building and holding out her hand
description: An older woman with white-gray hair stands in a warm outdoor setting, dressed in a white lab coat over a collared shirt. Her posture is welcoming — one hand extended forward in an offering or inviting gesture, the other relaxed at her side. Behind her is a large brick building consistent with a Pokemon research facility or university, flanked by trees. The card title reads 'Professor Magnolia' in small text at the top. The art is bright and warm-toned, consistent with the Champion's Path Galar-region aesthetic. The holofoil treatment adds shine.
foreground: elderly woman in white lab coat, hand extended forward
background: brick research building with trees, warm daylight
